title: parasenecio × abukumensis
intro: Parasenecio × abukumensis, also known as Japanese Golden Ragwort, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is a hybrid of Senecio cannabifolius and Packera abrotanifolia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Parasenecio × abukumensis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
